notes: Ascetic monk and bishop of Sebaste, early spiritual mentor and later theological opponent of Basil of Caesarea.

docs.excerpt: … in Athens To: Eustathius of Sebaste [ascetic monk and bishop; one of Basil's early spiritual mentors, later a theological opponent] Date: ~357 AD Context: Basil's earliest surviving letter — written before he became a bishop, expressing his obsessive desire to track down the wandering
